recommendation: When adding new page-level h1/h2/h3, use Tailwind text-lg/text-xl class instead of inline fontSize. Base rule provides Lora/500/1.30.

pattern: theme token alias drift — var(--color-*) used in TSX but never defined in globals.css
recommendation: Before PR, run the cross-platform token sweep from LR-4 in memory/learned-rules.md (node -e one-liner). Expect 'All N color tokens defined.' and exit 0.
